steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage says the artists 'incorporated Inuit throat singing into electronic music' and 'combined Indigenous flute and powwow vocals with electronic music.' The blank must describe what these artists do to the idea of a distinction between Indigenous and non-Indigenous music.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "reject": blending the styles means they do not accept the boundary between them — they refuse to keep the styles separate. ✓
  • "observe": observing a distinction means noticing it, not blending across it. ✗
  • "replace": replacing one style with another is the opposite of blending them. ✗
  • "disguise": disguising a distinction means hiding it deceptively, which is not what the passage describes. ✗
That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
